Quick Reflexes: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Choice Words About Your Mother
triggers.text: Choose an enemy model in LoS. Move the chosen model 6” toward this model.

tactical_actions.name: “Get Your Guard Up!”
tactical_actions.effects: The target heals 2 and gains a Focused token.

triggers.text: On Your Heels: Place this model into base contact with the target.

tactical_actions.name: Intimidation
tactical_actions.effects: Once per turn. Enemy models within range must either gain an Injured token or be dealt 2 damage. (soulstone) Second Wind: This model may remove any number of tokens on it and declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Solidarity
abilities.text: When an ally within 6" ends its activation, this model may drain a (soulstone) to move that model up to 6".

abilities.name: Stand Together
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage by an attack, reduce that damage by 1 for each ally within 3" of the attacker.

abilities.name: Unionized
abilities.text: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

attack_actions.name: Bosses Beware
attack_actions.effects: X is equal to the number of friendly models within 3" of the target (to a maximum of 4). (soulstone) The Language of the Unheard: Another friendly model within 3" of the target may declare the Charge action, ignoring engagement.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
